es.title: Sobre Nosotros
es.description: Información sobre el equipo de desarrollo y la filosofía que guía nuestro trabajo.

stoicQuote.author: Epicteto
stoicQuote.quote: No busques que los eventos sucedan como deseas, sino desea que sucedan como suceden, y fluirás bien. Aquel que no espera nada de nadie nunca será defraudado.

en.title: About Us
en.description: Information about the development team and the philosophy guiding our work.

stoicQuote.author: Epictetus
stoicQuote.quote: Seek not that the things which happen should happen as you wish; but wish the things which happen to be as they are, and you will have a tranquil flow of life. He who expects nothing from anyone will never be disappointed.
